name: Motion → Clear Calibration
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) discards any runtime calibration and restores the build-time matrix defined by `axis_map` or `transform_matrix` (or the identity matrix if neither is configured). Use it to undo a `motion.calibrate_level` / `motion.calibrate_heading` sequence without re-flashing.
